## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss progress on the Dgraph content strategy and explore expanding the content efforts to include thought leadership content for Kevin (CEO of GrowthX) on LinkedIn.](https://fathom.video/share/dF3D7YAMpydYLZ6PWFq_Lpja1EMEQK8E?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Early signals from the Dgraph content are positive, with one article ranking on the first page within a week](https://fathom.video/share/dF3D7YAMpydYLZ6PWFq_Lpja1EMEQK8E?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)
  - [Decided to continue the Dgraph content strategy for July to see where it goes](https://fathom.video/share/dF3D7YAMpydYLZ6PWFq_Lpja1EMEQK8E?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)
  - [Agreed to help Kevin establish a consistent LinkedIn presence by creating content workflows and templates](https://fathom.video/share/dF3D7YAMpydYLZ6PWFq_Lpja1EMEQK8E?tab=summary&timestamp=1202.0)
  - [Will gather Kevin's best past posts and record his thoughts/insights to generate a content library](https://fathom.video/share/dF3D7YAMpydYLZ6PWFq_Lpja1EMEQK8E?tab=summary&timestamp=1315.0)

## Topics

### Dgraph Content Performance

  - [One of the 5 published articles ranked on the first page within a week, a very positive signal](https://fathom.video/share/dF3D7YAMpydYLZ6PWFq_Lpja1EMEQK8E?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)
  - [Overall impressions and keywords ranking are trending upward, though still early](https://fathom.video/share/dF3D7YAMpydYLZ6PWFq_Lpja1EMEQK8E?tab=summary&timestamp=554.0)
  - [Agreed to continue the Dgraph content through July to evaluate further progress](https://fathom.video/share/dF3D7YAMpydYLZ6PWFq_Lpja1EMEQK8E?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)

### Potential Expansion to Hypernucleus Content

  - [Discussed expanding content efforts to also cover Hypernucleus (Kevin's new product)](https://fathom.video/share/dF3D7YAMpydYLZ6PWFq_Lpja1EMEQK8E?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)
  - [Need a few initial "pillar" thought leadership posts from Kevin first](https://fathom.video/share/dF3D7YAMpydYLZ6PWFq_Lpja1EMEQK8E?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)
  - [Then can augment with additional content following the same workflow](https://fathom.video/share/dF3D7YAMpydYLZ6PWFq_Lpja1EMEQK8E?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)

### Establishing Kevin's LinkedIn Presence

  - [Identified the need to build Kevin's personal brand on LinkedIn](https://fathom.video/share/dF3D7YAMpydYLZ6PWFq_Lpja1EMEQK8E?tab=summary&timestamp=1902.0)
  - [Will gather examples of LinkedIn influencers Kevin wants to mirror](https://fathom.video/share/dF3D7YAMpydYLZ6PWFq_Lpja1EMEQK8E?tab=summary&timestamp=1902.0)
  - [Kevin to record voice notes with thoughts, stories, rants to create a content library](https://fathom.video/share/dF3D7YAMpydYLZ6PWFq_Lpja1EMEQK8E?tab=summary&timestamp=1902.0)
  - [Marcel will template the content into proven "hook" formats for LinkedIn posts](https://fathom.video/share/dF3D7YAMpydYLZ6PWFq_Lpja1EMEQK8E?tab=summary&timestamp=1902.0)
  - [Start with text-based posts, maybe add images later](https://fathom.video/share/dF3D7YAMpydYLZ6PWFq_Lpja1EMEQK8E?tab=summary&timestamp=1902.0)
  - [Post consistently, repurpose successful posts after a few months](https://fathom.video/share/dF3D7YAMpydYLZ6PWFq_Lpja1EMEQK8E?tab=summary&timestamp=1902.0)

### Logistics

  - [Marcel's team will move the Dgraph site to the same stack as Hypernucleus](https://fathom.video/share/dF3D7YAMpydYLZ6PWFq_Lpja1EMEQK8E?tab=summary&timestamp=2957.0)
  - [Agreed on a 30-day cancellation policy if deciding to change direction](https://fathom.video/share/dF3D7YAMpydYLZ6PWFq_Lpja1EMEQK8E?tab=summary&timestamp=1250.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Kevin to identify LinkedIn influencers he wants to mirror](https://fathom.video/share/dF3D7YAMpydYLZ6PWFq_Lpja1EMEQK8E?tab=summary&timestamp=1902.0)
  - [Kevin to start recording voice notes with thoughts, stories, insights](https://fathom.video/share/dF3D7YAMpydYLZ6PWFq_Lpja1EMEQK8E?tab=summary&timestamp=1902.0)
  - [Marcel to gather templates and "hooks" for effective LinkedIn posts](https://fathom.video/share/dF3D7YAMpydYLZ6PWFq_Lpja1EMEQK8E?tab=summary&timestamp=1902.0)
  - [Evaluate performance in late July to decide on continuing Dgraph, adding Hypernucleus, or both](https://fathom.video/share/dF3D7YAMpydYLZ6PWFq_Lpja1EMEQK8E?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)
  - [Migrate Dgraph site to Hypernucleus stack](https://fathom.video/share/dF3D7YAMpydYLZ6PWFq_Lpja1EMEQK8E?tab=summary&timestamp=2957.0)
